subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Hold not Thy servants to account for their grievous transgressions and their great sins; adorn their heads [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لا تاخذ عبادک بجریراتهم العظمى وخطیئاتهم الکبرى، زین رؤوسهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
